sigWerNormalizedGold: 不 用 了 謝 謝
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: 行 了 謝 謝

sigWerErrors.reason: '不' (no/not) and '行' (okay/go) have opposite meanings, which changes the intent of the sentence from refusal to agreement, significantly altering the meaning.
Omitting '用' (need/use) removes the key part of the phrase '不用了' (no need), making the sentence incomplete and changing the meaning.
